hindi: जय गणपति सदगुण सदन, कविवर बदन कृपाल। विघ्न हरण मंगल करण, जय जय गिरिजालाल॥
english: Victory to Ganesh, abode of all virtues, gracious-faced lord; remover of obstacles, bringer of auspiciousness, victory to the son of Girija
roman: Jai Ganapati Sadgun Sadan, Kavivar Badan Kripal, Vighna Haran Mangal Karan, Jai Jai Girijala

hindi: जय जय जय गणपति गणराजू। मंगल भरण करण शुभ काजू॥
english: Victory to Ganesh, king of the ganas; bringer of auspiciousness, doer of all good works
roman: Jai Jai Jai Ganapati Ganraju, Mangal Bharan Karan Shubh Kaju

hindi: एकदंत दयावंत चारभुजाधारी। माथे सिंदूर सोहे मूषक असवारी॥
english: Single-tusked, compassionate, bearer of four arms; vermilion shines on his forehead, riding a mouse
roman: Ekdant Dayavant Charbhujadhari, Mathe Sindoor Sohe Mooshak Asvari

hindi: अंधकार और आग को टालो। संकट मोचन सबके प्रतिपालो॥
english: Dispel darkness and fire; O remover of obstacles, protect all
roman: Andhkar Aur Aag Ko Talo, Sankat Mochan Sabke Pratipalo

hindi: सूर श्याम शरण आए, सुख पाए। मंगल मूरत गणपति गाए॥
english: Devotees who came seeking refuge attained joy; singing of the auspicious form of Ganesha
roman: Sur Shyam Sharan Aaye Sukh Paye, Mangal Moorat Ganpati Gaye

hindi: जो गणपति को ध्याता है नाना। रिद्धि सिद्धि उसको मिलती नाना॥
english: Whoever meditates on Ganesha in many ways; receives many forms of prosperity and powers
roman: Jo Ganpati Ko Dhyata Hai Nana, Riddhi Siddhi Usko Milti Nana

hindi: श्री गणेश चालीसा जो कोई गाए। इच्छित फल जीवन में पाए॥
english: Whoever sings the Ganesh Chalisa; attains desired fruits in life
roman: Shri Ganesh Chalisa Jo Koi Gaye, Ichchhit Phal Jeevan Mein Paaye

hindi: जय गणपति जगदीश जगवंदित, चतुर सुजान। भक्त जनों के दुख को काटो, देहु अभय वरदान॥
english: Victory to Ganesha, praised by the world; clever and wise, cut the sorrow of devotees, grant the boon of fearlessness
roman: Jai Ganapati Jagdish Jagvandit, Chatur Sujan, Bhakt Janon Ke Dukh Ko Kato, Dehu Abhay Vardan
